blocks.content: Through the wall — not words, but the register of a voice pushed past its limit. The specific sound of someone who has been holding themselves together by force of will for two days and finally couldn't anymore.
Not him. That's grief. That's someone who lost their closest friend and is being asked if they benefited from it. Those are not the same thing.

He knew Davenport would press every person in that house. He knew some of those questions would land on the wrong shoulders. That was the nature of this — you applied pressure and the innocent ones cracked and the person you were actually looking for held steady because they had no other choice.

I have the beach. I have the window. I have a direction the IP is pointing. But I don't have the door — I still don't know how they locked it from outside. And I don't have the why. Not yet. Something happened between these people before this weekend that I can't see from here.
Without the why there's no full picture. And without the full picture I'm not standing up in a room and pointing at anyone.
He looked at his legal pad.
He left it turned over and went back to work.
